commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: extract playback engine into framework-agnostic modules (#32)

* refactor: extract playback engine logic into framework-agnostic modules

Extract pure domain logic from React hooks into `packages/viewer/src/engine/`:
- scene-timing: isBatchable, findBatchEnd, sceneDuration
- scene-navigation: computeUserPromptIndices, findNext/PrevUserPrompt, computeNextIndex
- annotation-store: add/update/remove annotation, computeAnnotatedScenes/Counts, hasUnsavedChanges

React hooks are now thin wrappers that delegate to engine functions for all
domain logic, keeping only timer management, state, and DOM interactions.

Added 57 unit tests covering all extracted functions. Set up vitest for the
viewer package and added it to the root `pnpm test` command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove redundant type guard in findBatchEnd, make isBatchable a proper
  type guard (scene is Extract<Scene, {type: "tool-call"}>)
- Change hasUnsavedChanges signature from (Annotation[], string) to
  (Annotation[], Annotation[]) — stringify is now internal
- Extract shared test helpers to __tests__/helpers.ts
- Fix parseThinking() to handle Cursor's new {text, signature} dict format

commit.message:
Fix style suffix to respect user's character choice (real vs fiction)

The injected suffix was only based on renderMode, ignoring characterStyle.
Now both render mode AND character style are injected:
- real + photo: "photorealistic, shot on cinema camera, real humans, natural skin"
- fiction + photo: "photorealistic, shot on cinema camera, animated fictional characters"
- fiction + illustration: "stylized 3D animation, animated fictional characters"

commit.message:
feat(proofguild): Phase 5 - ProofGuild Portal with SSE real-time updates (#131)

* feat(proofguild): Phase 5 - Guild system for agent visualization

Implement ProofGuild, a logical layer treating agents as guild members
with roles, levels, and visual states for RPG-style visualization.

Key features:
- Guild types: GuildRole, GuildVisualState, GuildMembershipStatus
- Self-registration API for external agents (POST /proofcomm/guild/register)
- XP/Level system (session-only, not persisted)
- Visual states: speaking (10s), active (60s), idle
- currentSpaceId tracking for room placement
- GuildMap component showing rooms with agent avatars
- GuildPanel component showing member list with levels/status
- Speaking bubbles with message preview

Design principles:
- PG1: ProofGuild is a logical layer (not UI name)
- PG2: Membership derived from existing data (no new DB)
- PG3: Portal is derived view (not source-of-truth)
- PG4: Self-registration API for external agents
- PG5: XP/Level calculated client-side (session-only)

Test coverage: 41 new tests for Guild logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 security review feedback

Security fixes:
- Require API key authentication for guild registration
  (Authorization: Bearer <GUILD_API_KEY>)
- Add production warning for missing GUILD_TOKEN_SECRET
- Return 503 if GUILD_API_KEY is not configured

Performance fixes:
- Change token storage to hash-keyed Map for O(1) lookup
- Add periodic cleanup interval (5 min) for expired tokens

Code cleanup:
- Remove unused `spaces` parameter from getGuildRole()
- Update toGuildMember() signature accordingly

Test coverage:
- Add API key validation tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #130 round 10 review feedback

Security improvements:
- Use timingSafeEqual for API key comparison (prevent timing attacks)
- Throw error in production if GUILD_TOKEN_SECRET not set
- Add SSRF protection with private IP range blocking
- Add 30-day token TTL with expires_at in response
- Use nullish coalescing for statusCode

Added tests for isExternalUrl covering all private IP ranges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #130 round 11 review feedback

Security improvements:
- Use HMAC-based comparison for API key validation (prevents length-based
  timing attacks even without length pre-check)
- Read GUILD_API_KEY at call time, not module load time (allows late
  environment configuration in tests and secrets managers)
- Defer GUILD_TOKEN_SECRET evaluation using lazy initialization (same reason)
- Document DNS rebinding limitation in isExternalUrl (fetchAgentCard has
  additional SSRF protection via isPrivateUrl)
- Fix misleading comment: "unauthenticated" -> "API-key authenticated"

Test improvements:
- Add validateApiKey happy path tests using vi.stubEnv
- Add isApiKeyConfigured state tests (configured/not configured)
- Total 23 tests in register.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 12 review feedback

Bug fixes:
- Add XP for 'registered' action (3 XP) in applyEvent to match sse-client.ts
- Remove guild from PortalState - use deriveGuildState() as pure projection
  instead to avoid stale state issues

Security documentation:
- Add detailed comment explaining HMAC key purpose in validateApiKey
  (length normalization only, no cryptographic function)

Code cleanup:
- Remove unused 'target' variable and TargetWithConfig import

Test improvements:
- Add 8 integration tests for registerGuildAgent covering:
  - Missing URL rejection
  - Invalid URL scheme rejection
  - SSRF protection (private IP blocking)
  - Duplicate URL rejection
  - AgentCard fetch failure
  - Successful registration with token
  - Custom name support
  - allowLocal flag

Total: 31 tests in register.test.ts, 2471 tests overall

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 13 review feedback

Must fix:
- Move duplicate URL check BEFORE fetchAgentCard to avoid unnecessary
  outbound HTTP calls on re-registration attempts
- Fix IPv6 fc00::/7 regex to cover both fc and fd prefixes (fd00:, fd12:, etc.)
  Pattern: /^\[?f[cd][0-9a-f]{2}:/i (handles bracketed IPv6 hostnames)

Should fix:
- Add resetCachedTokenSecret() helper for test isolation
  Allows vi.stubEnv to take effect by invalidating cached value

Test improvements:
- Add IPv6 unique local address test (fc00::/7 block)

Total: 32 tests in register.test.ts, 2472 tests overall

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 14 review feedback

- Fix *.localhost subdomain bypass in SSRF check (RFC 6761)
- Add rate limit test for 429 response path
- Add cleanupGuildTokens test with expired tokens
- Add targetsStore.add arguments assertion test
- Add *.localhost subdomain test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 15 review feedback

- Add URL scheme validation in isExternalUrl (defense-in-depth)
  Blocks file://, javascript://, data://, ftp:// schemes
- Add agent cap to renderGuildMap (MAX_MAP_AGENTS = 50)
  Prevents unbounded DOM growth matching renderGuildPanel behavior
- Fix partial failure cleanup in registerGuildAgent
  Generate token BEFORE DB write to avoid orphaned agent entries
- Namespace __lobby__ sentinel to _proofguild_lobby_
  Avoids collision with real space IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 16 review feedback

- Add maxLength validation to name (128) and url (2048) in Fastify schema
- Add comment to GuildRole noting moderator/observer are reserved for future
- Add try/finally to cleanupGuildTokens test for timer cleanup safety
- Add cross-reference comments for XP values between types.ts and sse-client.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 17 review feedback

- Use var consistently in renderGuildMap for ES5 browser compatibility
- Use Map for O(1) room lookup instead of Array.find (roomsBySpaceId)
- Document token restart behavior and recovery options in register.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): address PR #130 round 18 review feedback

- Add comment to validateGuildToken explaining Phase 6 usage
- Document rate limiter proxy/load-balancer considerations
- Add test for audit event emission (emitSpaceEvent with agent_id/agent_name)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofguild): wire SSE manager to audit logger for real-time portal updates

- Connect SseManager to AuditLogger in server.ts so events are broadcast
- Fix CORS headers in sse.ts using raw.writeHead() instead of reply.header()
- Allow cross-origin SSE in routes.ts CSP (connect-src *)

These fixes enable ProofGuild Portal to receive real-time events when
accessed from different machines on the network.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix RTL/LTR microcopy and strip M suffix from stored major chord names

- AudioChordDetector: add direction:rtl to all Hebrew text containers,
  wrap embedded English words (Start, Add) in <bdi> tags, flip arrows
  to ← to match RTL reading order, store chord via formatChordName so
  'CM' is saved as 'C' (no uppercase M for plain major)
- App: add direction:rtl to shared-progression banner span
- SongLibraryModal: add direction:rtl to empty-state paragraph, wrap
  'Save Song' in <bdi>
- LyricsTab: wrap 'Chords' in <bdi> inside Hebrew sentence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

added ATM LLD project with concurrency-safe design

Design patterns: Strategy (accounts), Template Method (transactions),
Factory Method (TransactionFactory), Observer (notifications).

Concurrency handling:
- ReentrantLock in CheckingAccount/SavingAccount for thread-safe balance ops
- Semaphore in CashDispenser for FCFS physical resource access
- AtomicInteger for thread-safe transaction ID generation
- BlockingQueue in PrinterManager for producer-consumer receipt printing
- Synchronized DepositSlot with volatile flag
- AtomicReference in AccountStatusManager for lock-free status transitions
- Ordered locking in Transfer to prevent deadlocks
- ConcurrentHashMap in repositories and SessionManager
- CopyOnWriteArrayList in NotificationService
- ExecutorService with timeout in BankCommunicationService

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 8 functional bugs from user journey sweep

- Restore customerEmail in checkout session API response (success page showed blank)
- Paid users can now access SCAT modules (101-105) via API (was returning 404)
- Remove redirect that blocked paid users from /scat-course page
- Nurture email CTAs now link to /login?email=... (was linking to auth-required /scat-course)
- Login page pre-fills email from query parameter for nurture email flow
- upgradeUser handles all valid upgrade paths (preview→online-only, preview→full-course)
- Fix createUser double-loading users list (was calling loadUsers + findUserByEmail separately)
- Add KV config guard to preseason submit/register routes (prevents unhandled crash)
- Fix quiz hash navigation for SCAT modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add daily bandwidth history chart with Week/Month/Year/All filter

- New /bandwidth/daily endpoint: aggregates MAX(bandwidth_today) per
  calendar day via SQL GROUP BY so each day shows its true daily total
  rather than a running intra-day reading.
- Bar chart in the Trends tab renders the daily totals and shows a
  period total (e.g. "Total this week: 1.24 GiB") below the chart.
- Client-side Week / Month / Year / All filter buttons slice the dataset
  without extra requests and highlight the active selection.
- Added from contextlib import closing to dashboard.py imports.

(both lost) but N too small for conclusions. Keep recording for CF tracking.

commit.message:
chore: [no-issue] scope CI triggers to main branch to eliminate duplicate runs (#20)

Running on both push and pull_request caused every PR commit to trigger
two identical unit test runs. Scoping both triggers to main means CI fires
once per PR event and once on merge, with no duplication on feature branch pushes.
The integration job condition was redundant after this change and is removed.

commit.message:
v0.0.56: Use API redirect endpoint when UI URL not explicitly set

When TerrakubeUiURL is not set, fall back to AzBuilderApiUrl with the
/app/{orgId}/{wsId}/runs/{jobId} redirect endpoint instead of constructing
a direct UI path that the API doesn't serve.

RedirectController on the API ignores the org/workspace path segments,
parses jobId as an integer, and issues a 302 to:
  {uiURL}/organizations/{orgId}/workspaces/{wsId}/runs/{jobId}

URL priority:
  - TerrakubeUiURL or TERRAKUBE_UI_URL → /organizations/... (direct UI link)
  - AzBuilderApiUrl fallback            → /app/.../runs/{jobId} (API redirect)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Post-Sprint, Race Eve, Race Live) that fetches stage-specific matrices without fallback. Lap
slider is hidden for non-race stages, and dashboard labels adapt to show stage context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: F1-Prediction-Engine
repository.description: ML-powered F1 race prediction engine with ensemble models, Monte Carlo simulations, and live race tracking

commit.message:
feat: SNS 가이드 상품 상세페이지 스타일 리디자인

- 쿠팡/상세페이지 스타일: 섹션별 배경색 교차, 큰 글씨, 시각적 강조
- 인스타(릴스 9단계, 피드 6단계, 스토리 4단계) 상세 가이드
- 유튜브(업로드 10단계, 쇼츠 7단계) 상세 가이드
- 카카오채널(포스트, 알림, 1:1 채팅) 상세 가이드
- 실전 시나리오 3개 (수업 클립, 연주회, 신학기 홍보)
- 채널 연결 플로우차트, 꿀팁 박스, 해시태그 UI
- 모바일/아이패드 최적화 + 인쇄 CSS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
